title: 5 Exceptional Dividend Stocks Yielding 5% (or More) to Buy Hand Over Fist

title: Energy Income Weekly: Commodity Price Declines Fail To Dent Midstream Cash Flows
text: It was a flat week for energy income equities where gainers and decliners were roughly equal. Natural gas-weighted names were weak in response to the 7% decline in natural gas prices.

title: Energy Income Weekly: A Surging WTI Fuels The Risk-On Trade
text: Commodity-exposed energy names significantly outperformed during the week. Various names have either broken out or are on the verge of breaking out to 52-week highs.

title: ONEOK Fourth Quarter and Year-end 2022 Conference Call and Webcast Scheduled
text: TULSA, Okla. , Jan. 17, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- ONEOK, Inc. (NYSE: OKE) will release fourth quarter and year-end 2022 earnings after the market closes on Feb. 27, 2023.

title: ONEOK: Ready For A Dividend Increase In 2023
text: ONEOK, Inc. reported a Q3 earnings miss but executed well on the operations front. Management guided to more than 10% EBITDA growth in 2023.

title: ONEOK: 5% Dividend Yield And Growing
text: ONEOK is a large midstream player. About 10% of the US natural gas runs through its network. I believe that natural gas prices in 2023 will bounce back. Here's why.

title: ONEOK: Buy This 5.4% Yielding Retirement Dream Blue-Chip
text: Blue-chip midstream is a great place to find safe high yield and decades of solid growth potential. But it sometimes comes with K1 tax forms and foreign dividend withholding taxes. OKE is the 5.4% yielding growth king of its industry and comes with no K1 forms or foreign withholding taxes.

title: Here's Why Oneok Inc. (OKE) is a Strong Value Stock
text: Wondering how to pick strong, market-beating stocks for your investment portfolio? Look no further than the Zacks Style Scores.

title: This Dividend Stock Offers a Unique Investment Opportunity in the S&P 500
